section.heading: Accelerated schedule for isolating high-level nuclear waste at the Defense Waste Processing Facility, Savannah River Site
section.chapeau: The Secretary of Energy shall accelerate the schedule for the isolation of high-level nuclear waste in glass canisters at the Defense Waste Processing Facility at the Savannah River Site, South Carolina, if the Secretary determines that the acceleration of such schedule—

paragraph.content: will achieve long-term cost savings to the Federal Government; and
could accelerate the removal and isolation of high-level nuclear waste from long-term storage tanks at the site.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 119–60, div. C, title XXXI, § 3111(a), Dec. 18, 2025, 139 Stat. 1401.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 2631 of Title 50, War and National Defense, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(1).
